title: Senior R&D EE Engineer (Tuas West)
description:
Our client is a emergent brand name in the medtech sector. We are looking for like-minded individuals who are passionate to join them to develop their next generation of medical electronics.

Senior / R&D EE Engineer
(Medical Devices – Tuas)

Responsibilities

·       Design, develop, and validate embedded hardware for medical devices from concept through commercial release.

·       Support system architecture, component selection, schematic design, PCB layout guidance, and hardware bring-up.

·       Develop mixed-signal, microcontroller-based circuits and integrate communication interfaces (UART, SPI, I²C, USB, BLE, etc.).

·       Perform hardware debugging, verification, validation, and compliance testing (functional, environmental, EMC).

·       Collaborate cross-functionally with firmware, mechanical teams, vendors, and certification bodies to ensure smooth system integration and manufacturing transition test protocol/script, and test report/record.

Requirements

·       Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electronics, Electrical, Biomedical Engineering, or related field.

·       3–5 years of hardware design experience, with hands-on involvement in end-to-end medical device development. Candidates with more than 5 years of experience can be considered for Senior Engineer position.

·       Strong expertise in microcontrollers/SoCs, analog front-end and mixed-signal design, power management, and PCB best practices.

·       Proven experience with hardware debug tools and design/simulation software (e.g., Altium, OrCAD, PSpice).

·       Solid knowledge of medical safety and EMC standards (IEC 60601-1, IEC 60601-1-2) with strong analytical and documentation skills.

Interested applicants, kindly send in a copy of your updated resume in WORD document to hr@searchstaffing.com.sg stating your current and expected remuneration together with notice period required to current employer.

You can also contact Vincent Low for a confidential discussion at 6749 4236.

EA Personnel Registration No: R1324700
